name: s7g-provenance
description: S7G Provenance Audit Agent — queries Hypercore append-only logs, verifies chain integrity, tracks governance actions

skills.name: Query Provenance History
skills.description: Read entries from the Hypercore provenance feed, filtered by action type, version, or time range

skills.name: Verify Chain Integrity
skills.description: Check that every entry's SHA256 hash links correctly to the previous entry, detect tampering

skills.name: Log Action to Provenance
skills.description: Append a new signed entry to the Hypercore provenance feed
